name: flashcms
summary: Nav progress feedback — top red progress bar + route skeletons in the admin so slow navigations feel responsive.
notes: Snapshot cut from the sfh-group-website working codebase.
See docs/extending.md for the pattern to add tables/blocks/routes.

changes: Add TopProgress client component — global link/form click listener that shows a red progress bar at the top of the viewport during route transitions and clears when the new pathname lands.
Add loading.tsx skeleton fallback in app/(admin)/admin/(authed) so slow segment fetches render a shimmer instead of freezing the current UI.
Add busy cursor + prefers-reduced-motion fallback and 15s safety timeout so the bar never sticks.
Includes Puck page editor, TipTap posts, media library, users + roles, analytics (visits + Web Vitals), SEO, site-settings, in-CMS update flow, and a full admin UI.
